creator: edwin@mavetju.org
text:
On Thu, Aug 02, 2007 at 04:36:15AM +0000, Kim Naim Lesmer wrote:
> >Synopsis:       Update of makefile and distinfo

As the maintainer of ports-mgmt/portcheck, we can expect you to
have read this chapter in the Porters Handbook:

    http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/porting-submitting.html

    Note: You can make our work a lot easier, if you use a good
    description in the synopsis of the problem report. We prefer
    something like ``New port: <category>/<portname> <short description
    of the port>'' for new ports and ``Update port: <category>/<portname>
    <short description of the update>'' for port updates. If you
    stick to this scheme, the chance that someone will take a look
    at your PR soon is much better.

Edwin, gnats-autoassign-troubleshooter

--
